name: Huevos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, combine onions, garlic, and olive oil. Heat gently for 5 minutes.
2. Add tomatoes and chili to the pan.
3. Meanwhile, in a separate pan, poach eggs.
4. Steam tortillas until heated through.
5. Place tortillas on individual plates.
6. Top each plate with poached eggs.
7. Pour sauce over the top of the eggs.
8. Sprinkle cheddar cheese over everything.
9. Serve 2.
